value.text: Apply for Card, EMI and Pay Later
Apply for Card, EMI and Pay Later

1. Installation & Demo request will be raised by Flipkart once the order is placed.

 2. Installation will be carried out by brand authorised service partner on the timeline mentioned on product page.

 3. Service provider will reach out to you via call/sms regarding the visit.

 4 attempts will be made before the service is cancelled.
What are the charges for availing installation & demo for my appliances?
What are the charges for availing installation & demo for my appliances?

1. Installation & Demo request will be raised by Flipkart once the order is placed.

 2. Installation and demo charges may vary based on the appliance type and brand. Some products include free installation, while others may have a service fee payable directly to the technician.
• Brand Warranty is valid only if the installation is handled by our authorised service partner.
Additional accessories will be charged extra.
• Make sure your society allows installation at the specified time. If not, please contact the service partner and reschedule it.
• You should be present at the location during delivery and installation.
